title: Compliance Tests Intake Spec
summary: This slice ships the canonical compliance-test surface under tests/compliance/, the first-slice manual runbook, severity routing, run-template fields, and the AGENTS trigger guidance. Review is green with review_passes: true, the compliance audit is green with compliance_passes: true, and the first slice keeps…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Round 06 and the delivery report complete the implementation/reporting flow. Librarian should index the emitted feature artifacts and preserve the round-04 remediation constraints in the feature index.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
